label: Fight: KO Hero
description: Defeating costs you one of your heroes

label: Fight: Draw
description: Defeating draws extra cards at end of turn

label: Fight: Deck Filter
description: Defeating lets you reveal/KO/rearrange top of deck

label: Fight: Gain as Hero
description: This henchman becomes a hero card in your deck

label: Fight: Conditional
description: Reveal-or-punish gate (reveal X or suffer penalty)
